drl: rule "TEST_PM25_SHIFT" when $a : PollutionAggregate( periodType == "shift", shift == "night", pollutant == "pm25", avgValue != null, avgValue > 55.0, countUsed != null, countUsed >= 20 ) then Alert alert = new Alert(); alert.setType("NIGHT_PM25_HIGH"); alert.setSeverity("HIGH"); alert.setLocationId($a.getLocationId()); alert.setMessage("Night shift PM2.5 high"); alert.setTs(new Date()); insert(alert); end
